meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Exit Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop watching, start shipping. Master Claude Code skills setup to turn ideas into revenue-generating SaaS products faster than ever. Beginner-friendly guide.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a byproduct of passive consumption. To escape, you must shift to an agentic development workflow. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you move from following steps to generating production-ready features. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces architectural best practices, and accelerates your MVP time-to-market significantly.
content.intro:
The screen glows with another 'Build a To-Do App' video, but your bank account remains empty. You’ve mastered the art of watching, yet your SaaS remains a phantom in your IDE. This is the silent killer of ventures: the comfort zone of tutorials that masks a lack of real-world shipping velocity.

Today, we break the cycle. We are moving beyond syntax and into high-leverage engineering. By marrying Claude Code’s reasoning engine with the structural rigor of Antigravity, you stop being a student and start becoming an architect. It is time to transform your vision into a deployed, revenue-ready asset.

steps.title: Initialize Environment with Claude Code
steps.description: Establish your development workspace by configuring Claude Code to index your repository, allowing it to understand your existing architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project structure and suggest an optimal folder hierarchy for a SaaS MVP that prioritizes scalability and rapid feature deployment.

steps.title: Define Business Logic Schema
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate your core data models, ensuring your database schema is optimized for SaaS subscription management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including user authentication, subscription tiers, and project entities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema from the previous prompt specs'

steps.title: Implement Auth and Middleware
steps.description: Secure your application infrastructure using industry-standard patterns, letting Claude Code handle the boilerplate integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement Next.js middleware for secure route protection and user session management using Auth.js.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication middleware following security best practices'

steps.title: Rapid Feature Prototyping
steps.description: Shift from manual coding to 'prompt-driven development' to build your core value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Develop a server action to handle customer payments via Stripe, including webhook verification and database updates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build the stripe checkout integration using the provided schema'

steps.title: Automated Testing and Validation
steps.description: Ensure your product is production-ready by generating unit and integration tests automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of Playwright tests to cover the critical user path from sign-up to successful checkout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate and execute playwright tests for the checkout flow'

pro_tips: Treat Claude Code as a Junior Dev: Always review the diffs, but trust the agent to handle the repetitive boilerplate.
Context is King: Keep your README updated; Claude Code reads it to understand your project vision and constraints.
Iterate, Don't Rewrite: Use Claude Code to refactor existing modules rather than asking for full-scale rewrites to maintain architectural integrity.
Leverage System Prompts: Create a '.claude-system-prompt' file in your root to define your coding style and framework preferences.
Focus on Hooks: Only ask Claude to build the core business logic; use existing libraries for UI components to keep shipping velocity high.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, prioritize deploying to Vercel or Railway and focus exclusively on acquiring your first ten paying customers.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical bridge to span the gap between idea and reality. Stop waiting for permission to build. The market is waiting for your solution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
